steps.title: Use the repopulation clue
steps.content: The sentence says the harvesting method allows new sweetgrass plants to repopulate the space, increasing number and vigor. The blank must describe restoring or building up wild populations.

steps.title: Reject words without restoration
steps.content: Choice A means chooses or picks out, not restores. Choice B means brings into existence from the start. Choice C means trains or influences, but it does not capture the increase in plant populations. The answer is D.
